description: Vibe Prospecting is an AI-powered B2B prospecting product from Explorium that brings company and contact data into chat-based workflows. Its website describes product pages, pricing, data coverage, and app signup, but the inspected public pages did not expose developer-facing integration endpoints on vibeprospecting.ai.
summary: No public developer integration surface could be confirmed on vibeprospecting.ai beyond marketing pages and an llms.txt file; no HTTP API, GraphQL API, MCP server endpoint, or CLI targeting vibeprospecting.ai was documented.
